2605.04677.title: CodeEvolve: LLM-Driven Evolutionary Optimization with Runtime-Enriched Target Selection for Multi-Language Code Enhancement
2605.04677.paper_summary: We present CodeEvolve, an evolutionary framework for improving program performance and code quality with Large Language Models (LLMs). CodeEvolve extends OpenEvolve with runtime-guided target selection, Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS), automated code refinement, and language-specific evaluation pipelines for Java and Salesforce Apex. The system uses Java Flight Recorder (JFR) profiles to build weighted component graphs and select optimization targets that account for most execution cost, reducing reliance on manual bottleneck identification. For each target, CodeEvolve generates candidate edits, evaluates them through build validation, unit tests, performance checks, static analysis, and LLM-based review, and retains only variants that preserve functional correctness. Across real-world optimization tasks, CodeEvolve improves performance and code metrics while maintaining correctness. On a large enterprise Java codebase, it achieves an average speedup of 15.22$\times$ across seven hotspot functions and outperforms single-pass LLM optimization on five of them. An ablation study on Apex optimization shows that the full MCTS-augmented configuration produces 19.5 valid programs out of 20 on average, indicating that search, filtering, and refinement each contribute to more reliable optimization.
2605.04677.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了 CodeEvolve，一個利用大型語言模型（LLMs）來改善程式性能和代碼質量的進化框架。CodeEvolve 擴展了 OpenEvolve，具有運行時引導的目標選擇、蒙特卡羅樹搜索（MCTS）、自動代碼精煉，以及針對 Java 和 Salesforce Apex 的特定語言評估管道。該系統使用 Java Flight Recorder (JFR) 配置檔來構建加權組件圖，並選擇考慮到大部分執行成本的優化目標，減少對手動瓶頸識別的依賴。對於每個目標，CodeEvolve 生成候選編輯，通過構建驗證、單元測試、性能檢查、靜態分析和基於 LLM 的審查來評估它們，並僅保留保持功能正確性的變體。在現實世界的優化任務中，CodeEvolve 在保持正確性的同時提高了性能和代碼指標。在一個大型企業 Java 代碼庫中，它在七個熱點函數上實現了平均 15.22$\times$ 的加速，並在其中五個函數上超越了單次通過的 LLM 優化。對 Apex 優化的消融研究顯示，完整的 MCTS 增強配置平均產生 19.5 個有效程序（滿分 20），這表明搜索、過濾和精煉各自對更可靠的優化有所貢獻。
2605.04677.author: Ajay Krishna Borra et.al.
2605.04677.authors: Ajay Krishna Borra, Wenzhuo Yang, Samarth Arora, Akhilesh Deepak Gotmare, Gokulakrishnan Gopalakrishnan, Tharun Gali, Madhav Rathi, Doyen Sahoo, Manpreet Singh, Mayuresh Verma, Laksh Venka, Shuchita Singh
